items.title: Desperate families search rubble weeks after Venezuela earthquakes
items.description: Families in Venezuela search through the rubble of their homes, weeks after the 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude earthquakes hit.

items.title: The war in Iran has left hundreds of U.S. diplomats in limbo
items.description: As the U.S-Iran war ramps up again, hundreds of diplomats are in limbo. The State Department drew down staffing due to Iran's attacks on Gulf states. It's unclear if they'll return to normal business.

items.title: Daily Quiz | On monument destroyed on July 21, 356 BCE
items.description: On July 21, 356 BCE, one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World was destroyed in an act of deliberate vandalism. Test your knowledge of the monument, its history, and its enduring legacy
